description: Square 'THE WORST FIRST' card. Background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands in metal handcuffs, with a dark gradient on the left. A top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with a white subline '2/15/2025 | St. Paul, MN'. A red diagonal corner banner at top-right reads 'ST. PAUL'. A large bold white name at mid-left reads 'Oscar Ocampo-Molina'. A bold white 'CRIME:' label has a bullet reading 'Sexual misconduct against a victim under 14'. The bottom-left has a round DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark; the bottom-right has a red box reading '-THE- WORST FIRST'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/15/2025 | St. Paul, MN; Oscar Ocampo-Molina; CRIME: Sexual misconduct against a victim under 14; ST. PAUL; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
